计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业2026年持续高热推荐，重庆 大学工科试验班（计算机与智能软件、未来信息、电气工程及其自动化）直接受益于专业热度；本省2026年普通高考总人数约209000人，较2025年物理类+历史类合计212851人略 有减少，按历史比例估算物理类约136895人，考生规模小幅缩减，竞争略有缓解，2025年物理类本科批425分、特殊类型招生控制线498分，近年波动不大。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年小幅扩招（+0.97%）、本省考生总数略有减少、学校声誉偏负面但抖音热度较热、工科热门专业持续 高热等因素，在2025年基准10026名基础上，扩招和负面声誉倾向于位次后移，但考生减少和热门专业热度倾向于位次前移，两者相互抵消后预计位次基本稳定、略向前移。预测 最低位次约10035名，区间9535–10535名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 9000 → 9352 → 10187 → 10751 → 10026, showing an overall backward trend, peaking at 10751 in 2024 before slightly recovering to 10026 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 874 positions over the past 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 10026; the university's enrollment plan in Chongqing for Physics Category was 1413 in 2021, 1412 in 2022, 1424 in 2023, 1438 in 2024, and 1436 in 2025, showing a steady increase overall; the 2026 plan is 1450, an increase of 14 students (about +0.97%) compared to 2025, a relatively small expansion with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 34th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, stable in the 33–34 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier engineering strong schools; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion accident raising campus safety concerns; Douyin popularity ranking 23rd (relatively hot), with some exposure on short video platforms; no obvious signal of a significant drop in historical admission records for Chongqing University. Overall, the negative incident may slightly suppress application enthusiasm, but the school's overall strength and regional advantages remain attractive; fifth round discipline evaluation A- and above: Civil Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Landscape Architecture A-; among them, Electrical Engineering and Mechanical Engineering are highly correlated with enrollment categories (Engineering Experimental Class Electrical Information Class, High-end Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing, etc.), providing strong support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., continue to be highly recommended in 2026; Chongqing University's Engineering Experimental Classes (Computer and Intelligent Software, Future Information, Electrical Engineering and Automation) directly benefit from major popularity; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is about 209,000, slightly decreasing from the combined 212,851 of Physics and History categories in 2025; estimated Physics Category about 136,895 based on historical proportions, with a slight reduction in candidate scale, easing competition; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 425 points, special type enrollment control line is 498 points, with little fluctuation in recent years.
7. [Regional Factor] Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, the only 985 university in the province, with a significant local enrollment proportion; in 2025, it enrolled 1436 students in the Physics Category in Chongqing, accounting for a certain proportion of the university's total national enrollment; local candidates have strong application willingness, and regional preference supports the ranking.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend of rankings, the slight expansion in 2026 (+0.97%), a slight decrease in the total number of candidates in the province, a somewhat negative school reputation but hot on Douyin, and the continued high popularity of engineering majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 10026, expansion and negative reputation tend to push the ranking backward, while the decrease in candidates and hot major popularity tend to push it forward; the two offset each other, and the ranking is expected to be basically stable, slightly moving forward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 10035, with a range of 9535–10535.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 10035, range 9535–10535. Candidates within the range are advised to primarily apply for Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (Computer and Intelligent Software, Future Information, High-end Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing), with Tier 1 Top Talent Program/Excellence Program/Clinical Medicine as reach options, and Tier 3 Smart Energy and Advanced Materials, Medical-Engineering Cross and Environmental-Chemical Health as safety options. Candidates significantly above the lower limit of the range (<9535) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1524 → 1644 → 1740 → 1595 → 1881, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. After a brief recovery to 1595 in 2024, it significantly moved back to 1881 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 141 positions over the past 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1881. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Chongqing was 93 in 2021, 90 in 2022, 77 in 2023, 72 in 2024, and 90 in 2025, showing a decrease followed by an increase. The 2026 plan is 94, an increase of 4 students (about +4.44%) compared to 2025, which is relatively significant and may alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 34th. As a comprehensive university, its liberal arts strength is not as prominent as its engineering, but the overall level still strongly attracts liberal arts candidates. In 2026, its reputation is somewhat negative (due to a laboratory explosion incident), and its Douyin popularity ranks 23rd (relatively hot). Historical admission records show no significant gaps for Chongqing University. The impact of negative events on liberal arts admissions is relatively limited, and the overall brand effect remains the main attraction. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chongqing University's A- and above disciplines are mainly engineering, with no liberal arts disciplines reaching A- level. However, as a comprehensive university, its humanities and social science majors still have competitiveness due to the 985 platform.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the Law major is assessed as divergent and wait-and-see, while Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, with stable popularity for popular liberal arts majors. The total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is about 209,000, with an estimated 72,105 in History Category (based on historical proportions), a slight decrease from 73,373 in 2025, leading to a minor easing of competition, with little fluctuation in recent years. Chongqing University is the only 985 university in the province, with a History Category enrollment plan of 94. Local candidates have a strong willingness to apply, and regional preference provides strong support for rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 4.44% (relatively significant), a slight decrease in the total number of History Category candidates in the province, and the university's somewhat negative reputation but still strong overall brand effect, both the expansion and the decrease in candidates tend to shift rankings forward. However, the inertia of the significant backward shift in 2025 and the stable popularity of liberal arts majors limit the extent of the forward shift. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1911, with a range of 1624–2198.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Boya Class, including Chinese, History, Philosophy)
- Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (Law and Journalism Category).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 1911, with a range of 1624–2198. History Category has few majors. Within the range, it is recommended to focus on the Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (Law and Journalism Category) as the main choice, with Chinese Language and Literature (Boya Class) as a reach, and Marxist Theory and English as safeties. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1624), prioritize reaching for Chinese Language and Literature (Boya Class).
